questions.question:
Gateway API resources in namespace `gateway-lab` are inconsistent.

A broken `Gateway` named `main-gateway`, a broken `HTTPRoute` named `app-routes`, and backend workloads already exist. Repair the Gateway API configuration so that:
- a `GatewayClass` named `cka-014-gc` exists with controller name `example.com/gateway-controller`
- `Gateway` `main-gateway` uses GatewayClass `cka-014-gc`
- the Gateway listens on HTTP port `80`
- `HTTPRoute` `app-routes` attaches to `main-gateway`
- host `apps.example.local` routes `/app1` to service `app1-svc` port `8080`
- host `apps.example.local` routes `/app2` to service `app2-svc` port `8080`
- any stale `/legacy` route is removed
- save the repaired HTTPRoute manifest to `/tmp/exam/q401/app-routes.yaml`

Do not recreate the backend Deployments or Services unless it is strictly required.

verification.description: GatewayClass and Gateway use the intended listener and class contract
HTTPRoute attaches to the Gateway and routes /app1 and /app2 to the intended backends
Backend services remain ready and the repaired HTTPRoute manifest is exported

questions.question:
A multi-container Deployment named `ops-api` in namespace `triage-lab` is unhealthy. The `api` container should serve nginx on port `80`, and the `log-agent` sidecar should tail `/var/log/ops/app.log`, but both containers are misconfigured.

Use workload logs and pod resource output to triage the issue, then repair the Deployment so that:
- the `api` container uses `containerPort` `80`
- the `api` container memory limit is `256Mi`
- the `api` container liveness probe checks port `80`
- the `log-agent` container uses env `LOG_TARGET=/var/log/ops/app.log`
- save the previous logs from container `log-agent` to `/tmp/exam/q402/log-agent-previous.log`
- save `kubectl top pod <active-pod> --containers` output to `/tmp/exam/q402/ops-api-top.txt`

Do not recreate the Deployment unless it is strictly required.

verification.description: The Deployment uses the intended port, memory limit, liveness probe, and sidecar log target
Previous log evidence and pod resource usage output are exported to the expected files
The repaired multi-container workload becomes Available without ongoing sidecar restarts

questions.question:
An upgrade planning brief for the control plane is incomplete and contains unsafe kubeadm lifecycle commands.

A ConfigMap named `upgrade-brief` already exists in namespace `kubeadm-lab`. Repair it so that:
- `targetVersion` is `v1.31.8`
- `controlPlaneEndpoint` is `k8s-api-server:6443`
- `planCommand` is `kubeadm upgrade plan v1.31.8`
- `applyCommand` is `kubeadm upgrade apply v1.31.8 -y`
- `drainCommand` is `kubectl drain cp-maint-0 --ignore-daemonsets --delete-emptydir-data`
- `uncordonCommand` is `kubectl uncordon cp-maint-0`
- `backupPaths` is `/etc/kubernetes/admin.conf,/etc/kubernetes/pki,/var/lib/etcd`
- save the repaired ConfigMap manifest to `/tmp/exam/q403/upgrade-brief.yaml`
- save a plain-text execution checklist to `/tmp/exam/q403/upgrade-plan.txt` with the sections `Pre-flight`, `Backups`, `Execution`, and `Post-upgrade`

Do not create a new ConfigMap and do not add live kubeadm upgrade automation beyond the requested plan artifacts.

verification.description: The upgrade brief ConfigMap uses the intended target version, endpoint, backup scope, and safe kubeadm command sequence
The plain-text upgrade checklist is exported with the required sections and commands
The repaired ConfigMap manifest is exported and no stale unsafe commands remain

questions.question:
A custom resource installation bundle in namespace `operator-lab` is incomplete. A CRD named `widgets.training.cka.io`, a Deployment named `widget-operator`, and a custom resource named `sample-widget` already exist, but all three are broken.

Repair the bundle so that:
- the CRD group is `training.cka.io`
- version `v1alpha1` is served and storage
- kind `Widget`, plural `widgets`, and scope `Namespaced` are used
- the CRD schema requires `spec.image` (string) and `spec.replicas` (integer)
- Deployment `widget-operator` in namespace `operator-lab` uses image `busybox:1.36.1`
- the operator Deployment runs exactly one replica and its container command sleeps for `3600` seconds
- custom resource `sample-widget` in namespace `operator-lab` uses apiVersion `training.cka.io/v1alpha1`
- `sample-widget` sets `spec.image` to `nginx:1.25.5`
- `sample-widget` sets `spec.replicas` to `2`
- save the repaired CRD manifest to `/tmp/exam/q404/widget-crd.yaml`

Do not install OLM and do not add extra cluster-wide controllers or RBAC beyond this bundle.

verification.description: The CRD uses the intended API group, kind, scope, and schema contract
The operator Deployment uses the intended image, replica count, and long-running command
The custom resource uses the intended spec and the repaired CRD manifest is exported
